headline: Stock Futures Fall as Investor Weigh Up Big Tech Earnings, Iran Fears
summary: Stocks looked set to edge higher on Thursday as investors tried to make sense of a deluge of Big Tech earnings and a sudden jump in oil prices.  S&P 500 futures climbed 0.1% and contracts tied to the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 added 0.2%.  The three major indexes struggled for direction on Wednesday after the Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged, as was widely expected.

content.title: Stock Futures Fall as Investor Weigh Up Big Tech Earnings, Iran Fears
content.summary: Stocks looked set to edge higher on Thursday as investors tried to make sense of a deluge of Big Tech earnings and a sudden jump in oil prices.  S&P 500 futures climbed 0.1% and contracts tied to the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 added 0.2%.  The three major indexes struggled for direction on Wednesday after the Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged, as was widely expected.

headline: Google Cloud pulls ahead as Big Tech's AI bet swells to $700 billion
summary: Alphabet's blowout cloud growth has reset expectations across major tech companies, leaving investors to recalibrate which firms are delivering the clearest returns.  Alphabet shares jumped more than 6% in premarket trading on Thursday, while Meta stock fell ‌nearly 9%.  Amazon shares rose 2.6%, while those of Microsoft  dipped 1.8%.

headline: Amazon Stock Bounces Back Following Positive Chip Demand Comments
summary: Amazon said that revenue from its Amazon Web Services cloud unit rose 28% from the prior year to $37.6 billion.  Revenue growth there is key as investors look for proof that companies are seeing returns on their massive artificial intelligence spending.  CEO Andy Jassy noted in the earnings release that it was AWS’s fastest growth in 15 quarters.

content.title: Amazon Stock Bounces Back Following Positive Chip Demand Comments

CEO Andy Jassy noted in the earnings release that it was AWS’s fastest growth in 15 quarters.

headline: Fed Inflation Gauge Hits 2-Year High As AI Boosts GDP; S&P 500 Rises (Live Coverage)
summary: The Federal Reserve's primary inflation measure hit its highest level since November 2023, while first-quarter GDP growth slightly undershot forecasts, despite a huge boost in spending on AI-related equipment and software.  The S&P 500 rose modestly after the data as investors weighed earnings reports and capital spending plans from Google, Amazon.com, Meta Platforms and Microsoft.  The inflation data follows Wednesday's hawkish policy signals at the final Fed meeting presided over by Chairman Jerome Powell.

content.title: Fed Inflation Gauge Hits 2-Year High As AI Boosts GDP; S&P 500 Rises (Live Coverage)
content.summary: The Federal Reserve's primary inflation measure hit its highest level since November 2023, while first-quarter GDP growth slightly undershot forecasts, despite a huge boost in spending on AI-related equipment and software.  The S&P 500 rose modestly after the data as investors weighed earnings reports and capital spending plans from Google, Amazon.com, Meta Platforms and Microsoft.  The inflation data follows Wednesday's hawkish policy signals at the final Fed meeting presided over by Chairman Jerome Powell.

headline: Druva Expands Cyber Resilience to Microsoft Power Platform
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., April 30, 2026--Druva, the leading provider of data security, today announced support for Microsoft Power Platform, extending cyber resilience to a growing layer of business applications, workflows, and analytics. With this launch, Druva introduces support for Microsoft Power BI as the first step in helping organizations secure and recover the assets that teams depend on for reporting, operational visibility, and decision-making.

content.title: Druva Expands Cyber Resilience to Microsoft Power Platform
content.summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., April 30, 2026--Druva, the leading provider of data security, today announced support for Microsoft Power Platform, extending cyber resilience to a growing layer of business applications, workflows, and analytics. With this launch, Druva introduces support for Microsoft Power BI as the first step in helping organizations secure and recover the assets that teams depend on for reporting, operational visibility, and decision-making.

headline: Microsoft Q3 earnings: Two reasons why the tech stock is falling
summary: Microsoft stock (MSFT) is dropping on Thursday despite the tech giant boasting fiscal third quarter earnings results that beat estimates, while its AI business grew 123% year over year. RBC Capital Markets managing director Rishi Jaluria sits down with Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman to dissect what's driving the Magnificent Seven tech stock lower.

headline: Why The Google Stock Rally Could Be Premature
summary: The true narrative for Alphabet (GOOGL) stock is not found in its headline 22% revenue growth or its 82% surge in earnings per share. Beneath the noise of Wall Street beats, the data reveals a fundamental conflict between rapid artificial intelligence growth and the heavy capital required to sustain it.

headline: Forget Tariffs — These 3 Threats Could Trigger the First Major Trump-Era Market Crash
summary: If you’ve been watching markets lately, you’ve probably noticed something odd: investors seem far less worried about tariffs than headlines suggest they should be.
